summary: Iteration 160: Stale Payout Detection Feature Testing. All features working correctly: scan_stale_payouts() marks processing > 24h payouts as stale, API returns stale payouts with user email enrichment (admin only), non-admin gets 403, scheduler includes job every 6h, frontend page displays empty state and stale payout cards with STALE badge, amount, email, dates, and Stripe link.

passed_tests.backend_admin_stale_payouts_api: PASS - GET /api/admin/stale-payouts returns 200 for admin with stale_payouts array and count
passed_tests.backend_non_admin_403: PASS - GET /api/admin/stale-payouts returns 403 for non-admin user
passed_tests.backend_response_structure: PASS - Response includes user_email enrichment for each payout
passed_tests.service_scan_marks_stale: PASS - scan_stale_payouts() marks processing > 24h payouts as stale with stale_detected_at
passed_tests.service_recent_not_touched: PASS - scan_stale_payouts() does NOT touch processing < 24h payouts
passed_tests.service_no_duplicates: PASS - Already stale payouts are not modified again
passed_tests.service_webhook_overwrite: PASS - Webhook can overwrite stale → completed
passed_tests.scheduler_job_exists: PASS - stale_payout_detection_job exists in scheduler.py with 6h interval
passed_tests.frontend_admin_dashboard_link: PASS - 'Payouts bloqués' link with AlertTriangle icon in AdminDashboard
passed_tests.frontend_page_loads: PASS - AdminStalePayouts page loads with correct title and refresh button
passed_tests.frontend_empty_state: PASS - Shows 'Aucun payout bloqué' when no stale payouts
passed_tests.frontend_stale_cards: PASS - Displays cards with STALE badge, amount, email, dates, Stripe link
passed_tests.frontend_stripe_link: PASS - 'Voir dans Stripe' button links to correct Stripe dashboard URL

critical_code_review_comments: scan_stale_payouts() correctly uses ISO string comparison for updated_at cutoff
Admin route properly uses require_admin() guard
User email enrichment correctly maps user_id to email
Frontend correctly handles both empty state and populated list
data-testid attributes properly added for all interactive elements

success_rate.backend: 100% (10/10 pytest tests passed + 5/5 direct DB tests passed)

seed_data_creation: Created temporary test payouts for direct DB testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stale payout detection feature fully implemented and tested. scan_stale_payouts() runs every 6h via scheduler, marks processing > 24h payouts as stale. Admin can view stale payouts at /admin/stale-payouts with user email enrichment and Stripe links. Non-admin users get 403. Webhook can still overwrite stale → completed/failed.
